summary: Post-spike decay from Feb 12 peak (100) to Feb 17 (13), heading toward baseline of 2-3. Decreases is dominant outcome.
content: Feb 12 spike to 100 due to House Judiciary Committee hearing on Epstein files. Rapid exponential decay: 100→61→36→23→17→13 over 5 days. Pre-spike baseline was 2-3. By Feb 28, value should be near baseline absent new spike. Ongoing political controversy (calls for resignation, Ticketmaster trial Mar 2) creates moderate risk of new spike. Monte Carlo simulation: Decreases 85%, Increases 11%, DC 4%. Scenario analysis: Decreases 83%, Increases 9.5%, DC 7.5%.
